name: @pedroibl/std
description: Pedro's personal standard — shared Bun+TypeScript vocabulary for reports, notes, and CLIs.
//publish: Published as @pedroibl/std ('std' unscoped is an abandoned-but-owned 2011 pkg). Consumers keep byte-identical imports via the npm alias: `bun add std@npm:@pedroibl/std` → `import { cite } from "std/core"`. Internal `std/*` self-imports (proof/ has 116) resolve via tsconfig.json compilerOptions.paths — NOT package self-referencing — so they survive this scoped name. Bun-only (raw .ts exports).
//bin: bin value has NO leading './' — npm normalization rejects './…' ('script name … was invalid', drops the entry); a bare relative path is kept. .ts is fine (Bun-only, runs via shebang).
